templates.name: Assessment Submitted
templates.body: Hey {{contact.first_name}}, this is Docta Herbalist Dwight. I reviewed your assessment and you may be a strong candidate for our wellness program. Book your consultation here: {{calendar_link}}

templates.name: Follow-Up
templates.body: Just checking in, {{contact.first_name}}. I'd love to help you get started. Here is your booking link: {{calendar_link}}

templates.name: Booking Confirmation
templates.body: You're confirmed for your Free 15-Minute Wellness Consultation. Please watch for your confirmation details by email and phone.
